ddls:
CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was made */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the award became effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the award expires */,
  "min_amend_date" TEXT /* Earliest date for amendment letters */,
  "max_amend_date" TEXT /* Latest date for amendment letters */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of award instrument (e.g., Continuing Grant, Standard Grant) */,
  "award_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the award */,
  "directorate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the directorate overseeing the award */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the division associated with the award */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator associated with the award */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the award period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the award period */,
  "funding_agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the funding agency that provided the award */,
  "grant_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grant type associated with the award */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the award */,
  "indirect_cost_rate" REAL /* Indirect cost rate associated with the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_instrument_type FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_type") REFERENCES award_types ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_directorate_id FOREIGN KEY ("directorate_id") REFERENCES directorates ("directorate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directorates" (
  "directorate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each directorate */,
  "directorate_name" TEXT /* Name of the directorate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("directorate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "directorate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the directorate that the division belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "award_types" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award type */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the award type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the award type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "pi_name" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator associated with the user */,
  "pi_email" TEXT /* Email address of the principal investigator associated with the user */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department associated with the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grant_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "award_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award related to the application */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the application */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the application was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the application (e.g., submitted, approved, rejected) */,
  "submission_status" TEXT /* Current status of the application submission process */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Current status of the application review process */,
  "funding_status" TEXT /* Current status of the application funding process */,
  "revision_count" INTEGER /* Number of revisions made to the application */,
  "last_revised_date" TEXT /* Date when the application was last revised */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_applications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_applications_award_id FOREIGN KEY ("award_id") REFERENCES awards ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amendments" (
  "amendment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amendment */,
  "award_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award that the amendment is related to */,
  "amendment_date" TEXT /* Date the amendment was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the amendment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amendment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_amendments_award_id FOREIGN KEY ("award_id") REFERENCES awards ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the funding source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the funding source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_distributions" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distribution record */,
  "award_id" INTEGER /* ID of the awarded grant */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the funding source providing the funds */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of funds distributed */,
  "distribution_date" TEXT /* Date when funds were distributed */,
  "funding_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the funding source associated with the distribution */,
  "funding_agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the funding agency associated with the distribution */,
  "award_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award type associated with the distribution */,
  "grant_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grant type associated with the distribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_distributions_award_id FOREIGN KEY ("award_id") REFERENCES awards ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_distributions_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES funding_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grant_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "award_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award related to the report */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was submitted */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., progress, final) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the report (e.g., submitted, reviewed) */,
  "report_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report type associated with the report */,
  "report_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report status associated with the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_reports_report_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_type_id") REFERENCES report_types ("report_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_reports_report_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_status_id") REFERENCES report_statuses ("report_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grant_reports_award_id FOREIGN KEY ("award_id") REFERENCES awards ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grant_types" (
  "grant_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grant type */,
  "grant_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the grant type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the grant type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grant_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_types" (
  "report_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report type */,
  "report_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the report type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_statuses" (
  "report_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report status */,
  "report_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the report status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_status_id")
)
